expectations.evidence: Scope lists 'src/pages/index.astro' explicitly; multiple findings cite index.astro:line

expectations.text: Output contains three distinct review layers or sections
Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
expectations.evidence: All three severity types used throughout

expectations.text: Layer 1 has at least 3 distinct findings
expectations.evidence: Layer 1 has 6 findings (3 BLOCKERs, 2 SHOULD-FIX, 1 NICE-TO-HAVE)

expectations.text: At least one finding includes a concrete suggested fix (not just 'this is bad')
expectations.evidence: Every finding ends with a concrete fix, e.g. 'Import a layout and wrap content via <Layout>...</Layout>'

expectations.text: Output flags missing <main> or landmark elements
expectations.evidence: Layer 1 BLOCKER: 'Missing semantic HTML structure. No <header>, <nav>, <main>, or <footer> landmarks'

expectations.text: No evidence of editing src/ files
expectations.evidence: Read-only Explore subagent, no file edits
